channel.title: The 642 Project on eddiequinn.xyz

item.title: Prompt 1 - What can happen in a second?
item.description: The alarm clock let out a horrific wail, interrupting me from my spirit induced slumber. I swung my hand over to the table to hit the beast, commanding its silence for the third time in the last fifteen minutes. The sun tapped at the window, glazing my eyes with a soft ache so far from both pain and comfort. The night before we celebrated the end of the war, and now I sit here in my own squalor, unsure what to do with myself.
